---
title: "write_posts"
author: Nicolas Mangin
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{write_posts}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(writR)
```


Introduction


*************

## Transformation into discrete variables
